name: governflow
description: GovernFlow — AI-native code governance pipeline. Four-layer assemble-over-build architecture.

scripts.build: tsc && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),path=require('path');function walk(d){for(const f of fs.readdirSync(d,{withFileTypes:true})){const p=path.join(d,f.name);if(f.isDirectory())walk(p);else if(f.name.endsWith('.js')){const c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');if(!c.endsWith('\n'))fs.writeFileSync(p,c+'\n','utf8')}}}walk('dist')"
scripts.bench: npx tsx benchmarks/intent-recognizer.bench.ts && npx tsx benchmarks/graph-traverser.bench.ts && node -e "const{readFileSync,writeFileSync}=require('fs');const{join}=require('path');const d=join('benchmarks','results');const i=readFileSync(join(d,'intent.md'),'utf8');const g=readFileSync(join(d,'graph.md'),'utf8');writeFileSync(join(d,'latest.md'),i.trim()+'\\n'+g.trim()+'\\n','utf8')"
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:core

author: 熊高锐
